Notice And Motion To Quash Plaintiffs Complaint For Lack Of Jurisdiction
Off Calendar Jul-23-2020 Continued To Sep-24-20 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 503
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances and tentative ruling adopted: Specially Appearing Defendant Weir Valves & Controls USA, Inc.'s Motion to Quash Plaintiffs' Complaint for Lack of Jurisdiction is continued to September 24, 2020 pursuant to Plaintiff's request to conduct jurisdictional discovery, which is granted. The discovery is limited to the issue of personal jurisdiction. Supplemental opposition, if any, due by September 10, 2020. Supplemental reply, if any, due by September 16, 2020. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
